name: Mit School Bus SVC

name: Aleksander Cohen-Harris Bus
notes: No USDOT (likely list noise / fabricated). SAFER keyword searches for 'COHEN-HARRIS' and 'ALEKSANDER' returned no records. The stated address 9651 Seward Rd #120, Fairfield OH 45014 is Extended Stay America - Cincinnati - Fairfield (a hotel), not a bus depot or commercial transport facility. Ohio Secretary of State business search returned no entity matching 'Aleksander Cohen-Harris' or 'Cohen-Harris Bus'. No web footprint for any school bus operator with this name in Fairfield OH. The compound 'first-name + hyphenated-surname + Bus' construction plus a hotel address strongly suggests this is a synthetic/AI-generated list entry or aggregator hallucination, not a real operating company.

name: Kansas Central School Bus
fmcsa_address: 3033 W Jefferson St Suite 220, Joliet, IL 60435
registry_source: FMCSA SAFER; NACSB corporate site; PitchBook profile
notes: Kansas Central School Bus is a DBA / regional brand of Illinois Central School Bus LLC (legal name), USDOT 1714924, MC-629008. Parent is North America Central School Bus (NACSB), owned by H.I.G. Infrastructure (acquired in recent years). The Paola KS site at 1705 Industrial Park Dr is a local terminal/yard servicing Paola USD 368 since 2010 (~5 employees, ~$192K estimated revenue at that branch per Buzzfile). This is NOT a tuck-in target — it is a yard of a large multi-state passenger carrier (2,619 power units, 3,073 drivers across IL/IN/WI/MO/KS/PA/ID/IA/TX/Ontario). HQ Joliet, IL. NACSB founded 2004. Note: address city mismatch (Paola KS branch vs. Joliet IL HQ) — the original list address is the terminal, not the legal entity address.

name: Rivero School Bus Inc
notes: No USDOT (likely intrastate-only). SAFER keyword searches for 'RIVERO SCHOOL BUS' and 'RIVERO' returned no records. Sunbiz entity search for 'RIVERO SCHOOL BUS' returned no exact match; nearby Rivero-prefixed FL entities exist (Rivero Transport Corp at 355 NW 72 Ave 211 Miami; Rivero Delivery Transport Corp filed 06/12/2024; Rivero Express LLC) but none are 'Rivero School Bus.' Address 14030 SW 56th Ter, Miami FL 33183 is a 1,095 sqft residential single-family home (built 1980, sold 12/30/2019 for $250K) — consistent with a small owner-operator private 'guagua' style school van operator running from a home. Miami-Dade approved private school bus companies list (M-DCPS) does not include a 'Rivero' entry. Likely either an unregistered/very small private parent-contracted van service or a list aggregator entry under an informal name.
